meaning: adj.鐪熻弻鐘剁殑,鏈夌湡鑿岀壒寰佺殑
examples: The bine is comprised by cerebral cortex, xylem and fungous marrow.
Objective To approach the treatment of pulmonary tuberculosis union bellows fungous infection.
Results 21 cases of 98 patients suffered from deep fungous infection and 2 patients died during the treatment.
